description_long: This is an ornate, three-armed candelabrum made of dark, aged metal with a slightly distressed finish. The central stem is elegantly shaped, supporting three candle holders, each containing a tall, cream-colored wax candle. The arms of the candelabrum are adorned with decorative scrollwork, adding a touch of classical sophistication. The base is wide and round, providing stability and a sense of grandeur. The candles are unlit, with visible wicks and smooth, unblemished surfaces. This object exudes a vintage or antique aesthetic, suitable for upscale urban environments or historical settings.
description: A decorative, three-armed metal candelabrum with cream-colored candles and ornate scrollwork, featuring a wide, stable base and an antique finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three candle arms, ornate scrollwork, and the full width of the candelabrum.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the central stem and the alignment of the three candles in a row.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with all three candle arms and scrollwork visible from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the candelabrum and the candles aligned front to back.
